summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoMerchant AI SaaS MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional (10/10 tests passed). Frontend authentication flow working. Critical bug found in Leads page preventing proper rendering due to React Select component issues.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem components missing required value props causing runtime errors
ui_bugs.selector: SelectItem in filter dropdowns and form selects
ui_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

integration_issues.issue: JavaScript errors prevent Leads page from rendering properly

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with all metrics after login

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (auth flow working, dashboard working, leads page failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Select component issues in Leads page - SelectItem components need proper value props. Error: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'. This is preventing the Leads page from rendering correctly.
